FRM-001.audit_reason: Required markers are visibly rendered on sampled business forms before submit.
checked_items: Checked customer create labels for visible required markers.
Checked company settings labels for visible required markers.
evidence: Customer required labels with markers: yes.
Settings required labels with markers: yes.

FRM-002.audit_reason: Inline validation appears on invalid input and clears on correction in the sampled business forms.
checked_items: Submitted the customer form with invalid values.
Checked field-level errors near inputs.
Corrected invalid VAT input and checked that the field error cleared.
evidence: Customer name error visible after invalid submit: yes.
Customer VAT error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-003.audit_reason: Error banners now explain both the problem and the next recovery step.
checked_items: Triggered an invalid customer submit.
Checked whether the blocking banner explains both failure and recovery.
evidence: Customer blocking banner text: Customer was not saved. Fix the highlighted fields, then try again..

FRM-004.audit_reason: Save behavior now shows explicit persistence confirmation after a successful settings save.
checked_items: Restored valid company settings data.
Saved settings and checked for explicit success confirmation.
evidence: Settings save confirmation visible: Company settings were saved successfully..

FRM-005.audit_reason: Sampled business forms now distinguish draft-in-progress state from a clean starting state.
checked_items: Opened a new customer draft.
Changed a field and checked whether draft-in-progress state became visible.
evidence: Draft indicator after editing: Draft in progress.

FRM-006.audit_reason: Blocked states now explain the stop condition and the next recovery move in one place.
checked_items: Triggered blocking states in customer creation and settings save.
Checked whether the banner explains the block and what to do next.
evidence: Customer blocking banner: Customer was not saved. Fix the highlighted fields, then try again..
Settings blocking banner: Settings were not saved. Fix the highlighted company fields, then try again..

FRM-007.audit_reason: VAT fields now expose format guidance and enforce it with inline validation.
checked_items: Checked customer and settings VAT hints.
Entered invalid VAT input in settings and checked for an inline error.
Corrected the VAT field and checked that the error cleared.
evidence: Customer VAT hint: Saudi VAT numbers contain 15 digits.
Settings VAT hint: Saudi VAT numbers contain 15 digits.
Settings VAT error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-008.audit_reason: CR number validation now enforces format and clears when corrected.
checked_items: Entered invalid CR input in settings.
Checked that an inline error appeared and then cleared after correction.
evidence: CR error before correction: CR number must contain exactly 10 digits..
CR error after correction cleared: yes.

FRM-009.audit_reason: Phone fields now expose structure guidance and working inline validation.
checked_items: Checked vendor phone hint text.
Entered invalid and valid phone values in the vendor form.
Entered invalid and valid phone values in settings.
evidence: Vendor phone hint: Use 9 to 15 digits, for example +966512345678.
Vendor phone error cleared after correction: yes.
Settings phone error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-010.audit_reason: Email fields now enforce valid structure in the sampled business forms.
checked_items: Entered invalid and valid email values in the vendor form.
Entered invalid and valid email values in settings.
evidence: Vendor email error cleared after correction: yes.
Settings email error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-011.audit_reason: Postal code validation now enforces length and clears when corrected.
checked_items: Entered invalid and valid postal code values in settings.
Checked that the inline error cleared after correction.
evidence: Postal code error before correction: Postal code must contain exactly 5 digits..
Postal code error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-012.audit_reason: PO Box input is now accessible and enforces format from the live UI.
checked_items: Checked that the PO Box field is visible in settings.
Entered invalid and valid PO Box values and watched the inline error clear.
evidence: PO Box hint: Use digits only or PO Box 12345.
PO Box error cleared after correction: yes.

FRM-013.audit_reason: Address structure is visibly enforced through separate required fields and blocking validation.
checked_items: Cleared street, city, and country in settings.
Triggered a blocked save and checked for address-structure guidance.
evidence: Settings address-structure banner: Settings were not saved. Fix the highlighted company fields, then try again..
Settings address-structure field message: Complete street, city, and country so the company address is structured before saving..

FRM-014.audit_reason: Fax validation now enforces digit structure when a fax number is provided.
checked_items: Entered invalid and valid fax values in settings.
Checked that the inline error cleared after correction.
evidence: Fax error before correction: Use a fax number with 9 to 15 digits when fax is provided..
Fax error cleared after correction: yes.

ACC-001.audit_reason: /workspace/accounting is not currently accessible from the frontend, so the system cannot proceed into this feature.
checked_items: Tried to open /workspace/accounting from the current frontend.
evidence: /workspace/accounting could not be verified as accessible during this dynamic pass.

INV-001.audit_reason: Inventory surfaces are reachable from the frontend, but this pass still treats deeper movement truth validation as partial until workflow evidence expands.
checked_items: Opened /workspace/user/stock from the current frontend.
Verified that the feature is accessible, so BLOCKED is not appropriate for this control point.
evidence: /workspace/user/stock is accessible from the current frontend shell.
